php:
<?php
function fibonacci(int $n): int {
    if ($n <= 1) {
        return $n;
    }
    $result = fibonacci($n - 1) + fibonacci($n - 2);
    return $result;
}

class Calculator {
    const PI = 3.14159;
    public string $name = "calc";

    public function add(int $a, int $b): int {
        return $a + $b;
    }
}

$values = [1, 2, 3];
$total = 0;
foreach ($values as $v) {
    $total += $v;
}
echo $total;
?>
ruby:
def fibonacci(n)
  if n <= 1
    return n
  end
  result = fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)
  return result
end

class Calculator
  PI = 3.14159
  attr_accessor :name

  def initialize
    @name = "calc"
  end

  def add(a, b)
    a + b
  end
end

values = [1, 2, 3]
total = 0
values.each do |v|
  total += v
end

function fibonacci(n)
    if n <= 1 then
        return n
    end
    local result = fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)
    return result
end

Calculator = {}
Calculator.PI = 3.14159
Calculator.name = "calc"

function Calculator.add(a, b)
    return a + b
end

local values = {1, 2, 3}
local total = 0
for _, v in ipairs(values) do
    total = total + v
end

haskell:
module Main where

fibonacci :: Int -> Int
fibonacci n
  | n <= 1    = n
  | otherwise = fibonacci (n - 1) + fibonacci (n - 2)

isPositive :: Int -> Bool
isPositive x = x > 0 && x /= 0

name :: String
name = "calc"

main :: IO ()
main = do
  let values = [1, 2, 3]
  let total = sum values
  putStrLn (name ++ " " ++ show total)
bash:
#!/bin/bash

fibonacci() {
    local n=$1
    if [ "$n" -le 1 ]; then
        echo "$n"
        return
    fi
    local a=$(fibonacci $((n - 1)))
    local b=$(fibonacci $((n - 2)))
    echo $((a + b))
}

values=(1 2 3)
total=0
name="calc"
for v in "${values[@]}"; do
    total=$((total + v))
done
echo "$name $total"
